channel.title: Posts on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on cron.umbe.me

item.title: Build a Goroutine Tracer with eBPF: Real-Time Go Debugging
item.description: Build a zero-overhead goroutine tracer using eBPF uprobes to monitor Go runtime events in production. Integrates with Prometheus and OpenTelemetry for real-time dashboards without modifying application code.

item.title: 7 Advanced Laravel Eloquent Patterns for Cleaner Queries
item.description: Seven advanced Eloquent patterns that transform messy, slow Laravel queries into clean, performant code. Covers query optimization, memory management, and debugging techniques for production applications.

item.title: Build a Historical Uptime Dashboard with Pimcore & SQLite
item.description: Build a custom uptime monitoring dashboard using Pimcore’s data modeling and SQLite for lightweight storage. Track any service’s availability history to identify patterns and correlate incidents with your deployments.

item.title: Build macOS Notch Overlays with Notchy: Dynamic Island UI Guide
item.description: This tutorial shows you how to build production-ready notch overlay systems for macOS using the Notchy framework. You’ll implement notch detection, create animated widgets, and handle edge cases for both notched and notch-less Macs.

item.title: Symfony Mailer: Build Professional Transactional Emails
item.description: Build a complete transactional email system in Symfony with async processing, i18n support, and cross-client rendering. Learn architecture patterns that scale from welcome emails to complex notifications.

item.title: MicroWARP: Ultra-Lightweight Cloudflare WARP Proxy in 800KB
item.description: MicroWARP delivers full Cloudflare WARP SOCKS5 proxy functionality in just 800KB of memory, compared to 80-150MB for traditional clients. This guide explains the architecture and shows how to deploy it for high-density container environments.

item.title: Build a Terminal Emulator with libghostty: Ghostling Architecture
item.description: Ghostling demonstrates how to build minimal terminal emulators using libghostty’s production-grade C API. This guide covers PTY lifecycle management, terminal state machines, and escape sequence parsing for custom developer tools.

item.title: Advanced Helm Charts: Hooks, Tests & Dependencies Guide
item.description: Learn to build production-grade Helm charts with hooks for atomic database migrations, test suites for pre-traffic validation, and dependency management for complex microservices. This guide bridges the gap between basic Helm usage and reliable Kubernetes deployment orchestration.

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture in Pimcore with Symfony Messenger
item.description: Learn to decouple Pimcore operations using Symfony Messenger for async workflows. Covers multi-transport setup, custom event subscribers, and resilience patterns for massive data operations.

item.title: Private EKS Cluster with OpenVPN: Complete Security Guide
item.description: Build a production-ready EKS cluster with private API endpoints and OpenVPN access for developers. Includes Terraform infrastructure, VPN setup, and observability stack deployment.
